summary: Frontend-only testing of AI-powered Resume Builder with 4 professional templates. All requested features tested successfully.

page_load.resume_builder_page: PASS - /resume-builder loads correctly with AI Resume Builder title
page_load.progress_stepper: PASS - 4-step stepper (Upload, Customize, Select Style, Export) visible

step1_input_module.continue_button: PASS - Initially disabled, enables when both resume and JD are filled

step2_customize.tone_selector: PASS - 3 tone options visible (Executive, Disruptor, Human)

step3_template_selector.harvard_executive: PASS - Visible with description 'Classic single column with serif fonts'
step3_template_selector.modern_tech: PASS - Visible with description '70/30 split with dark sidebar'
step3_template_selector.impact_first: PASS - Visible with description 'Bold headers with Key Wins box'
step3_template_selector.minimalist_ats: PASS - Visible with description 'Pure simplicity, maximum readability'
step3_template_selector.template_selection: PASS - All 4 templates selectable with visual indicator
step3_template_selector.preview_export_button: PASS - 'Preview & Export' button advances to Step 4

step4_preview_export.template_name_display: PASS - Shows correct template name matching Step 3 selection
step4_preview_export.harvard_preview: PASS - data-testid='harvard-preview' renders classic single-column layout
step4_preview_export.modern_preview: PASS - data-testid='modern-preview' renders two-column blue sidebar layout
step4_preview_export.impact_preview: PASS - data-testid='impact-preview' renders bold headers with KEY ACHIEVEMENTS box
step4_preview_export.minimal_preview: PASS - data-testid='minimal-preview' renders ultra-clean minimalist layout
step4_preview_export.change_template_button: PASS - data-testid='change-template-btn' navigates back to Step 3
step4_preview_export.cover_letter_tab: PASS - data-testid='cover-letter-tab' visible and shows cover letter content
step4_preview_export.edit_toggle: PASS - data-testid='edit-toggle-btn' toggles between Edit/Preview modes
step4_preview_export.resume_editor_textarea: PASS - data-testid='resume-editor-textarea' appears in edit mode
step4_preview_export.terms_checkbox: PASS - data-testid='terms-checkbox' controls export button state
step4_preview_export.export_pdf_btn: PASS - data-testid='export-pdf-btn' disabled until terms checked, enabled after
step4_preview_export.export_docx_btn: PASS - data-testid='export-docx-btn' disabled until terms checked, enabled after
step4_preview_export.ats_score_display: PASS - data-testid='ats-score-display' shows when matchScore is available

template_visual_distinctions.harvard: PASS - Centered header, serif fonts, single-column classic layout
template_visual_distinctions.modern: PASS - 28% blue sidebar (left) with 72% white content area (right)
template_visual_distinctions.impact: PASS - Blue header bar, KEY ACHIEVEMENTS box with amber stars, bold section headers
template_visual_distinctions.minimal: PASS - Left-aligned header, minimal gray section headers, dash bullet points

critical_code_review_comments: localStorage persistence working correctly for resumeBuilderData
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Template switching works seamlessly via selectedTemplate key
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage to inject test data for template preview testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Resume Builder with 4 templates (harvard, modern, impact, minimal) is fully functional. All template previews render correctly with distinct visual layouts. Export buttons (PDF/DOCX) require terms checkbox to be checked. localStorage key 'resumeBuilderData' persists state. All data-testid attributes work correctly for automated testing.
features_tested: Step 1: Can paste resume text and job description, then advance to step 2
Step 3 (Template Selector): All 4 templates visible and selectable
Step 4 (Preview Export): Shows correct template name matching Step 3 selection
Step 4: 'Change Template' button navigates back to Step 3
Step 4: Resume tab and Cover Letter tab are present and functional
Step 4: Edit/Preview toggle works on the resume text
Step 4: Terms checkbox exists and controls export button state
Step 4: PDF and DOCX export buttons exist and are disabled until terms are checked
Step 4: ATS score display shows when matchScore is available
Step 4: Each template preview has distinct visual layout when rendered
Harvard Template: Classic single-column serif layout
Modern Template: Two-column with blue sidebar
Impact Template: Bold headers with Key Achievements box
